summary: Great, high‑energy first set full of barn‑burners; recording quality not mentioned
review: Reviewers consistently praised the concert as a fantastic show, highlighting an explosive first set loaded with barn‑burning jams. No comments were made about the source or clarity of the audio, so the technical side remains unknown. Overall the memory of the performance is very positive.

ai_rating.rationale: Three reviews are uniformly enthusiastic about the musical performance with no noted recording flaws, leading to a high show rating and an assumed decent recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not discuss sound quality, source type, or any audio issues.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as packed with barn‑burners and high energy; overall show remembered fondly by attendees.
